title: Creative Conquest
description: A hardcore modpack about managing resources, expanding upon the create mod game loop.
body:
![Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f7bae107f5371c60b74702090759c62d32fc61.png)

The modpack is designed around the core principle of resource preservation, emphasizing strategic management of food and valuable materials. Players will need to carefully plan their expeditions, as food spoils over time, requiring proper storage and preservation methods to sustain long journeys. Resources are harder to obtain and deplete faster, encouraging a more thoughtful approach to crafting, building, and survival.

This slower-paced progression fosters cooperation, making teamwork essential for long-term success. Whether forming small survival communities or embarking on dangerous expeditions together, players must rely on each other's skills and shared resources to thrive. With an increased focus on sustainability and conservation, every decision matters—hoarding supplies recklessly can lead to shortages, while strategic planning ensures survival in the long run.

Prepare for a more immersive and challenging survival experience, where efficiency, teamwork, and careful planning determine your success in the world!
